# KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025 - Eligibility, Application, Online Form, and Admission Process
## KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology International Admissions
**KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology houses a dedicated KPR International Centre (KIC)** to cater to the needs of foreign nationals throughout their academic journey, from admission to their safe return home upon completing their studies. The Director of KIC brings nearly two decades of experience in assisting foreign students from over 20 countries. These students are admitted under the Foreign National/Children of Indian Workers in Gulf Countries/PIO quota, with special approval from the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). The center is staffed with an International Students Welfare Officer, an International Students Coordinator, and counselors who provide personalized support to foreign nationals.

With its growing reputation, recognition, and diverse cultural environment, KPRIET is becoming a preferred choice for international students worldwide. The KPR International Centre is responsible for recruiting international students through various initiatives, including participation in international education exhibitions, collaboration with foreign ministries of education and Indian Embassies abroad, and establishing Memoranda of Understanding (MoUs) with recruitment agencies and service providers. Additionally, the center ensures the welfare of international students throughout their academic journey.

The Director of KIC brings nearly two decades of experience in assisting foreign students from over 20 countries. # International Admissions, KPRIET, KPR Institute Engineering and Technology, Autonomous Engineering Institution, Coimbatore, India
#### International Admissions
KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology has a separate well established KPR International Centre (KIC) to take care of every single need of the Foreign Nationals on campus starting from their admission to day-to-day activities till reaching them safely at home on successful completion of their studies. The Director of KIC has nearly 20 years of experience in handling foreign students from more than 20 countries, admitted under the Foreign National / Children of Indian Workers in Gulf Countries/PIO quota with a special approval from All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). Separate International Students Welfare Officer, International Students Co-ordinator and Staff Counselors take special care of the Foreign Nationals.
KPRIET, with its reputation, recognition and the cross-cultural flavour, is now emerging as a leading educational destination for international students across the globe. The KPR International Centre has the responsibility of the recruitment of the international students through various promotional activities like participation in International Education Exhibitions, coordinating with the foreign ministries of education & Indian Embassies abroad, signing MoU’s with the recruitment agencies and service providers. Also, the cell takes care of the welfare of the international students all through the course of their study. Foreign Nationals - No. of Seats Available (Foreign Nationals / Persons of Indian origin/ Children of Indian workers in Gulf countries)

We are an Institute of Innovation and Enterprise

# International Admissions, KPRIET, KPR Institute Engineering and Technology, Autonomous Engineering Institution, Coimbatore, India
#### International Admissions
##### **Admission withdrawal (UG, PG)**
* Policy of refund

* Before approval - full fee refund

* After approval - approval fee and tuition fee for number of days attended will be deducted.

Visa Requirements

Candidates who are admitted under this scheme must obtain valid student visa issued by Indian missions abroad endorsed in the name of **KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore**.

Fitness

Candidates offered admission by our College have to submit a medical fitness certificate in the prescribed format (Annexure II).

Payment of Tuition Fee

On receipt of the admission letter the candidate has to pay the prescribed fee as indicated in the admission letter.

Hostel / Residential Accommodations

Hostel accommodation is available inside the campus. Interested Candidates may apply to The International Affairs Division / Deputy Warden of KPRIET Hostel for accommodation. They have to pay the prescribed fee as per hostel rules. Separate blocks in the existing hostels are available for foreign students. The hostel mess (vegetarian/ Non-Veg) is run separately for the International students

/ B.Tech. / M.B.A. Degree Courses for the academic year 2017 - 2018 from the Foreign Nationals / PIO / Children of Indian Workers in Gulf Countries and Non-Resident Indians. Applicants can register their name and academic details in the online registration form. Application forms for admission can also be downloaded from the website or from The Director - KPR International Centre, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore – 641 407, Tamil Nadu, India or Office of Overseas Consultants in person. The completed application forms with all documents required, along with the Registration fee of US$ 500 in the form of a bank draft / cash in favour of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology payable at Coimbatore, India should The Director - KPR International Centre, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore – 641 407, Tamil Nadu, India on or before July 2023 as prescribed in the application form

# International Admissions, KPRIET, KPR Institute Engineering and Technology, Autonomous Engineering Institution, Coimbatore, India
#### International Admissions
##### **Online Registration**
* Applications are invited in the prescribed format for admission into the B.E. / B.Tech. / M.B.A. Degree Courses for the academic year 2017 - 2018 from the Foreign Nationals / PIO / Children of Indian Workers in Gulf Countries and Non-Resident Indians.

* Applicants can register their name and academic details in the online registration form. Application forms for admission can also be downloaded from the website or from **The Director - KPR International Centre, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore – 641 407, Tamil Nadu, India or Office of Overseas Consultants** in person.

* The completed application forms with all documents required, along with the Registration fee of US$ 500 in the form of a bank draft / cash in favour of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology payable at Coimbatore, India should **The Director - KPR International Centre, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore – 641 407, Tamil Nadu, India **on or before July 2023 as prescribed in the application form.

* Further Information can be availed at the International Affairs Division, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology and at our Overseas Consultants Offices.

# International Admissions, KPRIET, KPR Institute Engineering and Technology, Autonomous Engineering Institution, Coimbatore, India
#### International Admissions
##### **Documents Required**
The following documents are required along with application*
* Copy of mark sheets of qualifying examinations

* Copy of syllabus of qualifying examinations

* Copy of Transfer/Migration certificate

* Passport and visa copy / Copy of Citizenship card (for Nepal & Bhutan students only)

* Provisional eligibility certificate (PEC) from Anna University, Chennai, India(Annexure I)

* Equivalence certificate from Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai, India

* Undertaking to be furnished in the Prescribed Form

* Passpost size photo - 6 copies

* Documents (2) not required first year B.E./ B.Tech. candidates.

* Documents (5) & (6) will be guided by the college.

* The originals of the above mentioned certificates must be surrendered to the college office at the time of admission for verification by Anna University.
